# osdgoogle_cluster_admin (Resource)

Creates an HTPasswd identity provider with a cluster-admin user for an OSD cluster on GCP.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) Identifier of the cluster.

### Optional

- `password` (String, Sensitive) Admin password. Auto-generated if omitted. Must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character (min 14 chars).
- `username` (String) Admin username. Defaults to 'admin'.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) OCM identity provider ID.
